HALLUCINATORY_LAMP.title: Hallucinatory Lamp
HALLUCINATORY_LAMP.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
HALLUCINATORY_LAMP.flavor: Rub it, and a second you steps out of the smoke.
PRISM_SHARD.title: Prism Shard
PRISM_SHARD.description: Whenever you create a [gold]mirror image[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
PRISM_SHARD.flavor: Every facet remembers a different light.
HEAD_START.title: Swift Boots
HEAD_START.description: The first card you play each turn costs 1 less.
HEAD_START.flavor: The race is won before the first step.
UNBREAKABLE_MIRROR.title: Unbreakable Mirror
UNBREAKABLE_MIRROR.description: The first time you would take unblocked damage each combat, your [gold]mirror images[/gold] are not destroyed.
UNBREAKABLE_MIRROR.flavor: Crack it all you like — the reflection will not break.
PRISTINE_MIRROR.title: Pristine Mirror
PRISTINE_MIRROR.description: At the end of your turn, if you took no unblocked damage that turn, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
PRISTINE_MIRROR.flavor: Not a single smudge. Not a single scar.
ANCIENT_LAMP.title: Lamp Unbound
ANCIENT_LAMP.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Copy[/gold] 3. At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]mirror images[/gold], [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
ANCIENT_LAMP.flavor: Its first owner wished for company. He was never alone again.
